description.value: **Benefit:** Whenever you use the attack action against a creature that is possessed, both the creature and any creature possessing it are damaged by your attack (the amount of damage includes your weaponâs damage dice, your Strength modifier, weapon special abilities, and so on). The possessing creature can attempt a Will save (DC = 10 + 1/2 your base attack bonus + your Charisma modifier) to halve the damage. Damage Reduction applies normally against this attack, but incorporeal creatures take full damage from this attack as if they were corporeal.
